author: lyqed
description: Copy the full raw Markdown of the current note to your clipboard (mobile toolbar + desktop ribbon). - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: lyqed
manifest.description: Copy notes to clipboard with title prepended. Supports single notes, whole folders, and a toggle to include/exclude YAML frontmatter.
manifest.name: Copy Note Content

name: Copy Note Content

releases.author: Lyqed
releases.description: Add folder name header (`### folder-name ###`) at the top of copied folder content.

releases.author: Lyqed
releases.description:
## What's new

### Title prepended to every copy
Notes now always start with `# <filename>` as an H1 heading when copied, making the output ready to paste into any context.

### YAML frontmatter stripped by default
Frontmatter is removed before copying. To include it, go to **Settings → Copy Note Content** and enable **Include note metadata**.

### Copy folder content
Right-click (or long-press on mobile) any folder in the file explorer and choose **Copy folder content**. All markdown notes in the folder and its subfolders are collected, sorted by path, each prefixed with its title, and joined with `---` separators into a single clipboard entry.
